The Workato Agent Studio API provides programmatic access to manage AI agents (genies), skills, and knowledge bases within the Workato Agentic Automation platform. Use this API to create and configure AI agents, assign skills and knowledge bases, and control agent lifecycle. Rate limits are 1,000 requests per minute for list/get operations and 60 requests per minute for all other operations.
